primary_operations.name: save
primary_operations.sdk_call: this.jdbi.useHandle(h -> h.createUpdate("INSERT INTO t(id,payload) VALUES (:id,:p)").bind("id", id).bind("p", payload).execute());

primary_operations.name: findById
primary_operations.sdk_call: return this.jdbi.withHandle(h -> h.createQuery("SELECT payload FROM t WHERE id = :id").bind("id", id).mapTo(byte[].class).one());

primary_operations.name: deleteById
primary_operations.sdk_call: this.jdbi.useHandle(h -> h.createUpdate("DELETE FROM t WHERE id = :id").bind("id", id).execute());

code_style_notes: JDBI is thread-safe; pass one Jdbi instance everywhere.
Use named parameter binding via :name placeholders.
useHandle for void writes, withHandle for queries that return a value.
